summary: Tested ACA compliance software iteration 2 with redesigned MEC Checker, MV Calculator, and ALE Calculator pages. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% pass rate) but critical frontend authentication issues blocking UI testing.

critical_bugs.issue: Login form does not authenticate users properly - clicking Sign In button does not navigate to dashboard
critical_bugs.impact: CRITICAL - Blocks access to all application functionality
critical_bugs.details: Credentials are accepted in form but no navigation occurs. All protected routes redirect to login page.

ui_bugs.issue: Protected pages show blank content with only 'Made with Emergent' text
ui_bugs.impact: Application not rendering properly after route navigation

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login not calling backend /auth/login API properly or not handling response
integration_issues.details: Backend login API works perfectly in tests, frontend integration broken

passed_tests: Payroll summary with auto-calculated FTE and ALE status - NEW
All existing backend endpoints (plans, certifications, dashboard)

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 32 API tests passing including new redesigned endpoints

action_item_for_main_agent.details: Login form not working - users cannot authenticate and access the application. Backend auth APIs work perfectly, issue is in frontend login integration.
suggested_fixes: Check login form submit handler and API call
Verify token storage and retrieval in AuthContext
Ensure React app renders properly on protected routes

action_item_for_main_agent.details: Frontend components missing data-testid attributes needed for reliable testing
